---
title: "run_all_models"
output: html_document
---


```{r}
stan_models <- c("wba_model.stan")
datasets    <- c("test_data_wba_wd1_ws05.csv")

for (stan_file_name in stan_models) {
  for (data_name in datasets) {
    
    # Auto-generate a fitted model name from the two input names
    model_prefix <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(stan_file_name)
    data_prefix <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(data_name)
    fitted_model_name <- paste0(model_prefix, "_", data_prefix, ".rds")
    
    source("fitting_script.R")
  }
}
```
